title: eruca sativa subsp. stenocarpa
intro: Eruca sativa subsp. stenocarpa, commonly known as wild rocket or rocket salad, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eruca sativa subsp. stenocarpa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a food ingredient in salads and other culinary dishes.
